body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: CC shim assignment model dispatch reliability
body.description:
**What changed:** Granny now dispatches via bus envelope only; CC shim owns ack + nag + HALT. tmux knowledge removed from Granny.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
- Nag loop fires too aggressively if CC_SHIM_NAG_INTERVAL default is too short — CC gets flooded with 'check messages' during long sprints
- Ack note on ticket accumulates noise if a ticket is nagged many times
- HALT message gets injected mid-command, corrupting CC's input buffer (three-Enter interrupt mitigates but doesn't eliminate)
- If CCWorkerListener restarts, it re-nags tickets that CC has already internally queued but not yet moved to in_progress — duplicate nags

**Signals to watch:** nag frequency in CC session transcript; ticket note volume; any reports of corrupted CC input; CCWorkerListener restart behavior under the new model.

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-20 or after first week of live operation.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate as occurred/clear/partial; close
**Completion criteria:** Predicted effects annotated as occurred/clear/partial and ticket closed.
